sources.title: Cross-Sectional and Time-Series Tests of Return Predictability: Cross-Asset Momentum Approach
signal_ideas: Cross-asset momentum: use past government bond returns to predict future equity returns, and vice versa
Time-series momentum applied across asset class boundaries rather than within
Bond-equity momentum spillover as a regime-aware signal
sources.implementation_notes: Could adapt to metals-crypto cross-momentum: use gold returns to predict silver direction, or bond momentum to predict metals. Already partially implemented in metals_cross_assets.py but this formalizes the time-series approach.

sources.title: Learning to Rank: Enhancing Momentum Strategies Across Asset Classes
signal_ideas: Learning-to-rank (LTR) algorithms for cross-sectional momentum ranking
Replace simple momentum sorting with ML-based ranking across bonds, equities, commodities, FX
LTR significantly enhances momentum in several asset classes vs naive sorting

backtest_results.description: ML-filtered momentum outperforms static sort in bonds and commodities

sources.implementation_notes: Could replace our simple momentum signal with an LTR-based cross-asset ranking. Would need sufficient history across all 5 tier-1 instruments. Heavy ML infrastructure requirement.

sources.title: Gold Silver Pair Trading - Mean Reversion Strategy Using Machine Learning
signal_ideas: Gold-silver spread z-score with ML regime filter (Gradient Boosting, SVM)
Z-score normalization of gold/silver spread for mean reversion entries
Regime filter trained on volatility, macro, and sentiment features to distinguish stable vs unstable spread
ML-filtered entries reduce drawdowns during high-vol regimes (COVID, inflation spikes, commodity rallies)

backtest_results.description: ML-filtered mean reversion outperforms static statistical arbitrage
backtest_results.improvement: better entry precision, reduced drawdowns in high-vol regimes

sources.implementation_notes: HIGHLY RELEVANT. We already track gold/silver ratio in metals_cross_assets.py. Could implement: (1) z-score of ratio with entry/exit thresholds, (2) ML regime gate using existing volatility + macro features. The ratio recently compressed to <50 from >100 — extreme regime. Zenodo dataset available for replication.

sources.title: A Reliable Approach to Forecast Prices of Precious and Base Metals
signal_ideas: Multi-factor precious metals forecasting model
Journal of Finance Issues methodology for metals price prediction
sources.implementation_notes: Could not access full abstract due to SSRN 403. Worth reading the full paper for specific methodology.

sources.title: Forecasting Price Volatility of Non-Ferrous Metals: Econometric vs ML vs AI Models
signal_ideas: GARCH achieves best/comparable MSE performance vs LSTM for metal volatility forecasting
Pretrained Chronos model shows superior accuracy under MAE and QLIKE metrics
Volatility forecasting ensemble: GARCH + Chronos for metals

backtest_results.description: GARCH matches LSTM on MSE; Chronos outperforms on MAE and QLIKE

sources.implementation_notes: VALIDATES our Chronos-2 deployment. Paper confirms pretrained Chronos outperforms on MAE/QLIKE for metals volatility. Could add a GARCH ensemble layer alongside Chronos for volatility-adjusted signals. We already have Chronos running but accuracy has regressed — this suggests MAE/QLIKE are better evaluation metrics than directional accuracy.

sources.title: Precious Metals in Financial Markets: A Copula Application
signal_ideas: Copula-based dependency structure between precious metals
Tail dependence detection for extreme co-movement events
Non-linear dependency signals between gold, silver, platinum
sources.implementation_notes: Could enhance our dynamic correlation module (currently dead code per memory). Copula approach captures tail dependence that Pearson correlation misses — exactly our known bug.

sources.title: Asynchronous Market Efficiency in Precious Metals Markets: A Local Currency Lens
sources.authors: Hafiz Rana, Fergal O'Connor, Erez Yerushalmi, Jae H. Kim
signal_ideas: Adaptive Market Hypothesis testing in locally-denominated precious metals
Time-varying efficiency exploitable during inefficient regimes
Local currency pricing reveals inefficiencies hidden in USD-only analysis
data_requirements: precious metals prices in multiple currencies
sources.implementation_notes: Interesting for our SEK-denominated warrant trading. If gold/silver show different efficiency regimes in SEK vs USD, we could time entries based on SEK-specific inefficiency windows.

sources.title: Understanding Currency and Precious Metal Interconnectedness During Crises
sources.authors: Nikolaos Kyriazis, Shaen Corbet, Konstantinos Dimitriadis, Imran Yousaf
signal_ideas: Crisis-regime currency-metals connectedness shifts
DXY and currency stress as leading indicators for metals moves
Cross-asset contagion signals during inflationary and geopolitical crises
sources.implementation_notes: Complements our existing DXY cross-asset signal (currently disabled). Could add crisis-regime detection as a gate: when crisis connectedness spikes, amplify metals signals.

sources.title: Bitcoin 2025-2026 Macro Analysis: Policy, Institutional Flows, and Strategic Positioning
signal_ideas: ETF-driven demand model for Bitcoin price forecasting
Monte Carlo simulation using regulatory treatment scenarios
Sovereign adoption probability as a regime signal
M2 money supply growth correlation with BTC (r=0.78 in 2020-2023)

backtest_results.description: Monte Carlo base case $150K-$250K, tail scenarios >$750K under sovereign adoption
backtest_results.correlation: M2 growth vs BTC price r=0.78

sources.implementation_notes: M2 correlation of 0.78 is actionable. Could implement a Global M2 Growth signal: track M2 from Fed, ECB, BOJ, PBOC and use YoY growth rate as a BTC directional signal. ETF flow data available from multiple sources.

sources.title: Bitcoin Price Dynamics: Macroeconomic Correlations, Halving Cycles, and Institutional Adoption
signal_ideas: Halving cycle positioning signal (150-day pre/post halving windows)
Institutional adoption acceleration metric via ETF flow momentum
Macro correlation regime shifts as entry/exit timing
sources.implementation_notes: Halving cycle signal is partially captured by our existing system. The ETF flow momentum signal is new and actionable.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETFs and Structural Decoupling in the Cryptocurrency Market
signal_ideas: BTC decoupling from altcoins as a regime indicator
BTC dominance > 60% signals institutional-led (not retail) market
Altcoin correlation dynamics as a risk-on/risk-off signal
sources.implementation_notes: BTC dominance at 60% now. When BTC dominance peaks and reverses, it historically signals altcoin rotation (bullish ETH). Could add BTC.D momentum as an ETH timing signal.

sources.title: The Extremity Premium: Sentiment Regimes and Adverse Selection in Cryptocurrency Markets
signal_ideas: Extreme F&G regimes predict excess uncertainty beyond realized vol (p<0.001, Cohen's d=0.21)
Extremity premium: extreme fear AND extreme greed both widen spreads vs neutral periods
Granger causality from uncertainty to spreads (F=211)
Effect replicates on ETH and across 6 of 7 market cycles
Within-volatility-quintile comparisons show significant premium

backtest_results.description: Significant extremity premium in BTC/ETH across 6/7 cycles

sources.implementation_notes: HIGHLY RELEVANT. We already use F&G as a contrarian signal. This paper adds nuance: BOTH extreme fear AND extreme greed predict wider spreads/uncertainty. Could enhance our F&G signal with a volatility-regime-aware gate: during extremes, expect higher vol and adjust position sizing. The Granger causality F=211 is extremely strong.

sources.title: Risk Premia in Commodity Markets
signal_ideas: News-based uncertainty factors with negative risk premium in commodities
Commodities as safer-at-bad-times assets — contrarian signal during uncertainty spikes
Cross-sectional commodity pricing using uncertainty and volatility factors
sources.implementation_notes: Confirms our contrarian approach during fear spikes. Could formalize: when news uncertainty index spikes AND commodities are 'safer at bad times', increase metals allocation.

sources.title: Momentum Factor Investing: Evidence and Evolution (150-Year Study)
signal_ideas: 150-year momentum factor evidence across global markets
Momentum robustness across domestic and international markets
Evolution of momentum premium over time — still statistically significant

backtest_results.description: Robust momentum factor over 150 years of data across global markets

sources.implementation_notes: Confirms momentum is robust. Our momentum signal is already active. Low incremental value.

sources.title: CME Group: Relative Value Prospects of Precious Metals in 2026
signal_ideas: Gold/Silver Ratio breached 100x (2020-like extreme) then compressed to <60x — mean reversion signal
Gold-real yield divergence: gold rallied despite elevated real yields — structural regime shift
Metals ADV up 35% to 988K contracts — volume confirmation signal
Fiscal posture analysis as metals macro indicator
sources.implementation_notes: Three actionable signals: (1) G/S ratio mean reversion when breaching extreme levels (>95 or <55), (2) GYDI-style gold-real-yield divergence composite, (3) CME metals ADV as volume confirmation. Ratio recently at <50 — extreme low, historically mean-reverts to 60-70.

sources.title: CME Group: The Great Inflation Debate — Precious Metals vs Bonds
signal_ideas: Breakeven inflation rate as a metals/bonds relative signal
TIPS yield inversion as a gold accumulation trigger
Precious metals outperformance vs bonds during fiscal deterioration regimes
sources.implementation_notes: Aligns with our existing Breakeven Inflation Momentum signal (pending validation). Could promote from disabled to active if combined with the real-yield divergence signal.

sources.title: Gold-Real Yield Divergence Tracker (GYDI)
signal_ideas: GYDI composite score (0-100): Paradox Spread (40%), Correlation Break (35%), Treasury vs Gold Momentum Split (25%)
30D gold-yield correlation at +0.18 vs baseline -0.45 = structural regime shift
Paradox regime detection: both gold and yields rising simultaneously (18% of months since 2020, avg 2.8 months)
Correlation break magnitude: current 0.63 units vs 0.5-unit threshold for max score
Four-tier severity: LOW (0-24), ELEVATED (25-49), HIGH (50-74), CRITICAL (75-100); current = 42 ELEVATED
sources.implementation_notes: HIGHLY ACTIONABLE. Implement GYDI as new signal module: (1) Paradox Spread (gold return * yield change sign alignment, 40% weight), (2) Correlation Break (30D rolling corr vs 3Y baseline of -0.45, 35% weight), (3) Momentum Split (gold return minus bond return proxy, 25% weight). All data from FRED + Binance FAPI. When GYDI > 50, traditional real-yield models unreliable.

sources.title: World Gold Council: Gold Demand Trends Q1 2026
signal_ideas: Central bank buying rate: 243.7t Q1 2026 (+3% YoY) — leading indicator
ETF flow momentum reversal: Q1 2026 ETFs at 62t vs 230t Q1 2025 (-73% YoY) — bearish divergence
Bar & coin demand surge (+42% YoY to 473.6t) — retail FOMO signal
Gold demand value at record $193B Q1 (+74% YoY) — euphoria indicator
Jewelry demand collapse (-23% YoY) — high-price demand destruction
sources.implementation_notes: ETF flow reversal (-73% YoY in Q1 2026) is potential bearish divergence despite rising prices. Bar/coin surge (+42%) suggests retail FOMO. Monitor for ETF outflow acceleration as early warning. WGC data quarterly but daily ETF holdings from SPDR GLD available.

sources.title: Silver Institute: 2026 Market Outlook — Sixth Consecutive Deficit
signal_ideas: Structural deficit: 67 Moz projected 2026 (6th consecutive year)
Gold/silver ratio below 50 (lowest since 2012) — extreme compression, mean reversion risk
Physical investment demand +20% to 227 Moz — momentum signal
Industrial fabrication decline -2% to 650 Moz (4-year low) — demand destruction
ETP holdings 1.31B oz, silver breached $100 then failed — key resistance
sources.implementation_notes: G/S ratio <50 is historically extreme — previous compressions preceded ratio expansion (bearish silver vs gold). Industrial demand declining despite deficit — price destroying demand. $100 failed breakout = major resistance. 6th year deficit is structural bullish but priced in.

sources.title: Sprott: Silver Investment Outlook Mid-Year 2025
signal_ideas: Cumulative shortfall 2021-2025: ~800 Moz — inventory drawdown signal
Total ETF/mobile inventory drawn since 2019: 1.1B oz — physical squeeze risk
Solar PV now 17% of silver demand (up from 5.6% in 2015) — structural demand shift
Mine supply down 7% since 2016 — supply inelasticity
G/S ratio at 91x vs historical mean 67x (mid-2025) — silver undervalued
Silver rallies ~2x gold magnitude during precious metals bull markets

backtest_results.historical_pattern: silver rallies approximately 2x gold during bull markets

sources.implementation_notes: COMEX registered silver inventory and LBMA vault holdings are leading physical squeeze indicators. When registered-to-eligible ratio drops, physical squeeze risk rises. Solar PV demand trackable via IEA quarterly.

sources.title: Amundi Research: Gold Beyond Records
signal_ideas: Multi-factor gold valuation: inflation + CB balance sheets + bond yields
Central bank buying deceleration H1 2025: 415t (-21% vs H1 2024) — divergence signal
Record gold ETF monthly inflows Q3 2025: $26B — euphoria indicator
Institutional gold allocation ~2% vs current traction — underweighting signal
Three structural catalysts: geopolitical risk premium, fiscal deterioration, demographic shift
High gold price volatility may curb CB purchases — GVZ as demand-side signal
sources.implementation_notes: CB buying deceleration while prices rise = potential divergence. Track monthly CB net purchases via IMF/WGC. GVZ spike -> CB demand reduction -> price vulnerability. Could combine with GYDI for comprehensive gold regime model.

sources.title: Binance Research: Key Trends in Crypto — June 2025
signal_ideas: BTC spot ETF inflows as momentum signal
ETH Pectra upgrade catalyst (+43.9% in May 2025)
DeFi TVL jump +21.4% MoM as crypto risk-on indicator
BTC ATH at $111,970 — breakout confirmation
Hyperliquid OI at ATH ($10.1B) as retail FOMO indicator
US-China tariff dynamics as crypto volatility driver
sources.implementation_notes: DeFi TVL MoM change partially captured by Crypto Macro signal. ETF flow momentum is new. Futures OI at ATH is contrarian warning.

highest_priority_new_signals.name: Gold-Real Yield Divergence Index (GYDI)
highest_priority_new_signals.description: Composite index measuring breakdown of gold-real yield inverse correlation. Three sub-components: Paradox Spread (40%), Correlation Break (35%), Momentum Split (25%). Four-tier severity 0-100.
highest_priority_new_signals.rationale: Structural regime shift confirmed by CME, S&P Global, Amundi, AhaSignals. 30D correlation at +0.18 vs -0.45 baseline. When GYDI > 50, traditional models break. Our Gold Real Yield Paradox signal (pending validation) partially addresses this but GYDI composite is more robust.

highest_priority_new_signals.name: Gold-Silver Ratio Mean Reversion with ML Regime Gate
highest_priority_new_signals.description: Z-score of gold/silver ratio with Gradient Boosting regime filter. Enter mean reversion trades only when regime is 'stable'. SSRN paper confirms outperformance 2015-2025.
highest_priority_new_signals.rationale: G/S ratio compressed from >100 to <50 — most extreme range in decades. Mean reversion statistically robust per SSRN. ML regime gate reduces drawdowns. Already track ratio in metals_cross_assets.py.

highest_priority_new_signals.name: Global M2 Money Supply Growth Signal
highest_priority_new_signals.description: Aggregate M2 from Fed+ECB+BOJ+PBOC. YoY growth rate as BTC directional signal. Correlation r=0.78 confirmed by SSRN for 2020-2023.
highest_priority_new_signals.rationale: Strong correlation (0.78) with BTC. Data from FRED (Fed M2) and central bank APIs. Low cost — monthly fetch + YoY calculation + threshold.

highest_priority_new_signals.name: ETF Flow Momentum Signal
highest_priority_new_signals.description: Daily gold ETF (GLD holdings) and BTC ETF net flows. 5-day and 20-day flow momentum as directional signals.
highest_priority_new_signals.rationale: ETF flows are dominant marginal buyer for gold and BTC. 2024-2025 reversal coincided with gold breakout. Q1 2026 shows -73% YoY for gold ETFs — potential early warning.

highest_priority_new_signals.name: Silver Physical Inventory Squeeze Monitor
highest_priority_new_signals.description: COMEX registered silver inventory, LBMA vault holdings, registered-to-eligible ratio. Alert on threshold breaches.
highest_priority_new_signals.rationale: 1.1B oz drawn from inventory since 2019. 6th consecutive deficit. Physical squeeze risk elevated. COMEX data available daily.

highest_priority_new_signals.name: F&G Extremity Premium Gate
highest_priority_new_signals.description: Enhance existing F&G signal: both extreme fear AND extreme greed predict excess uncertainty. Adjust position sizing during extremes. Based on N=2896 day study with p<0.001.
highest_priority_new_signals.rationale: SSRN paper (Farzulla 2026) shows extremity premium with strong statistical significance across BTC and ETH. Granger causality F=211. Replicates across 6/7 cycles. We already have F&G — enhancement is straightforward.

existing_signals_to_validate_or_promote.action: Promote to active — multiple sources confirm structural regime shift
existing_signals_to_validate_or_promote.evidence: CME, S&P Global, Amundi, AhaSignals all confirm gold-real yield decoupling is structural

existing_signals_to_validate_or_promote.action: Promote to active — CME confirms inflation debate is key metals driver
existing_signals_to_validate_or_promote.evidence: CME Great Inflation Debate paper pits metals vs bonds explicitly

existing_signals_to_validate_or_promote.action: Switch evaluation metric from directional accuracy to MAE/QLIKE
existing_signals_to_validate_or_promote.evidence: Sieradzki & Kwiatek 2025 shows Chronos outperforms on MAE/QLIKE vs GARCH/LSTM for metals

existing_signals_to_validate_or_promote.action: Review — CME confirms cross-metals relative value is key 2026 theme

key_market_regime_observations: Gold-real yield inverse correlation BROKEN since 2022 — structural shift from CB buying + de-dollarization
Gold/Silver ratio compressed from >100 to <50 in 12 months — most extreme move in decades
BTC structurally decoupling from altcoins due to ETF-driven institutional demand (BTC.D 60%+)
Silver industrial demand declining at high prices despite structural deficit — demand destruction risk
Central bank gold buying decelerating (-21% H1 2025 YoY) while prices rise — divergence warning
Silver breached $100 then failed back below $80 — $100 is major resistance
Gold ETF flows reversed -73% YoY in Q1 2026 despite price gains — potential bearish divergence
Extreme F&G regimes (both fear AND greed) predict excess uncertainty with p<0.001 in crypto
